headline: South Florida Tech Week: Angel Groups Merge, AI Sales Startups & Padel Boom 🌴

stories.title: Miami Angels and New World Angels Merge to Form Statewide Network
stories.summary: Two major South Florida angel networks combined to create a larger platform with better deal flow access and AI-powered diligence for founders. The move aims to simplify fundraising with a single entry point to bigger capital pools.
stories.takeaway: Lowkey a huge infrastructure play for South Florida startups looking to raise. The merged group is already seeing 5x more pitch volume with AI handling diligence.

stories.title: Racquet 360 Raises $9M to Scale Padel Ecosystem Across US
stories.summary: Key Biscayne startup bet big on padel's US growth with $9M from sports investors. Founder Emiliano Abramzon (who sold Nearpod for $650M) is building the full ecosystem—from a pro league to e-commerce to club management.
stories.takeaway: Miami's becoming the padel mecca and Racquet 360 is positioning itself as the infrastructure play. Projected 300% revenue growth this year is fr fr wild.

stories.title: Cyrus AI Automating Sales Workflows for Enterprise Reps
stories.summary: Miami startup building AI that handles the tedious parts of sales—approvals, doc updates, follow-ups. Co-founders Ali Zolfaghari and Jake Heenehan met at Vendr, saw the pain, and built the fix.
stories.takeaway: Not trying to replace reps but multiply them by 4x. The 'messy middle' of sales (updates, docs, approvals) is where most time gets wasted and Cyrus is targeting that.

stories.title: Neural Earth Raises $9.3M Seed to Scale Climate Risk Intelligence
stories.summary: Miami-based geospatial AI platform raised $9.3M to help insurance and real estate companies assess climate risk. Uses satellite imagery and proprietary analytics to turn complexity into property-level risk scores.
stories.takeaway: Climate risk is getting serious and traditional models are breaking. Neural Earth's AI matching real environmental pace is resonating with investors—seed was oversubscribed.

watchNext.title: Tech Hub Pulse on South Florida's Tech Economy Future
watchNext.why: Explores AI, drones, and space/defense opportunities in South Florida. Predicts 3-5 IPOs in next 60 months and growth surge if major tech leaders move to region.

watchNext.title: FAU Gets $4.5M Air Force Flight Simulator Investment
watchNext.why: Defense tech momentum in South Florida keeps building. FAU's T-1A Jayhawk simulator signals government interest in regional aerospace innovation hubs.
